---
title: "All Projects"
title-block-banner: true
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        layout: 
            title: false
page-layout: article
---

## Data Visualization
:::: columns

::: {.column width="55%"}
This is a repository of 
[code, analysis, visualization, plotly]
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
Image 1
:::

::::

## I Swear, You're Not Stupid.
:::: columns

::: {.column width="55%"}
This is a repository of 
[code, analysis, visualization, plotly]
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
Image 1
:::

::::

## Creative Coding
:::: columns

::: {.column width="40%"}
Image 2
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
Description 2
[code, analysis, visualization, plotly]
:::

::::
